narrative:
Fostoria City has 7,197 registered voters, with 64.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points.
